column1: # SYNTHETIC PLACEHOLDER — NOT REAL WUELLER 2026 DATA
# These five rows are obviously-fabricated stand-ins so the
# selene compare-wueller comparison harness has a non-empty input to
# exercise. Every site_id is prefixed "synthetic-placeholder-"; do
# NOT cite or interpret these coordinates as Wueller 2026 results.
# Real source (intended): Wueller
# Potential Landing Sites With Favorable Illumination and Accessible
# Potentially Volatile-Rich Permanently Shadowed Regions Within Artemis
# Candidate Landing Regions." Journal of Geophysical Research: Planets
# doi:10.1029/2025JE009434. Site coordinates appear in Table A1 of the
# paper; the AGU/Wiley publication is currently gated and no open
# supplementary data release has been located. See README §"Data
# acquisition status" for the search trail and the path forward.
# When the real Table A1 / data release becomes available
# this file in place (preserve the column schema below). The
# selene compare-wueller CLI auto-detects the synthetic placeholder
# via the site_id prefix and prints a "synthetic placeholder; not a
# real scientific result" notice in that case.
# Column schema (planetocentric lat/lon on R = 1737.4 km lunar sphere
# matching the USGS polygons CRS shipped at
# src/selene_base/validation/data/nasa_regions_polygons_usgs.geojson):
#   wueller_site_id
wueller_site_id
